allow: PowerShell(\(Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5000/api/dances\) | Select-Object id, name, slug | Sort-Object slug | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($bySlug = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5000/api/dances/loose-legs; $byId = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5000/api/dances/22; "by slug: id=$\($bySlug.id\) name=$\($bySlug.name\)"; "by id:   slug=$\($byId.slug\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:5000/api/dances/reebok-3; "reebok-3: id=$\($r2.id\)")

PowerShell($d = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://dance-api.takelord.com/api/dances'; $d | Where-Object { $_.name -match 'Reebok|Butterfly|Waacking vid' } | Select-Object id, name, slug, videoCount, favoriteCount, learnedCount, ratingCount | Format-Table)
PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 pi@pi "echo SSH-OK; which psql; sudo -n -u postgres psql -c 'SELECT 1' 2>&1 | head -2")
PowerShell(ssh pi@pi "sudo -u postgres psql -d dance_platform -c '\\dt' 2>&1 | head -30")

PowerShell(ssh pi@pi "PGPASSWORD=dancebabydance psql -h 192.168.0.197 -U dance_user -d dancing -c 'SELECT \\"Id\\", \\"Username\\", \\"IsAdmin\\" FROM \\"Users\\" WHERE \\"Username\\" = '"'"'justas'"'"';'")

PowerShell(ssh pi@pi 'PGPASSWORD=dancebabydance psql -h 192.168.0.197 -U dance_user -d dancing -c "SELECT \\"Id\\", \\"Username\\", \\"IsAdmin\\" FROM \\"Users\\" WHERE \\"Username\\" = '"'"'justas'"'"';"')
PowerShell(ssh pi@pi 'PGPASSWORD=dancebabydance psql -h 192.168.0.197 -U dance_user -d dancing -c "SELECT \\"Id\\", \\"Username\\", \\"IsAdmin\\" FROM \\"Users\\" ORDER BY \\"Id\\";"')

PowerShell(ssh pi@pi 'PGPASSWORD=dancebabydance psql -h 192.168.0.197 -U dance_user -d dancing -c "UPDATE \\"Users\\" SET \\"IsAdmin\\" = true WHERE \\"Id\\" = 10 RETURNING \\"Id\\", \\"Username\\", \\"IsAdmin\\";"')

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "https://dance-api.takelord.com/api/dances" -AllowInsecureRedirect; Write-Host "Total dances: $\($r.Count\)"; $r | Group-Object { $_.styles -join ',' } | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Count\)x [$\($_.Name\)]" })

PowerShell(Start-Process "ollama" -ArgumentList "serve" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:11434/api/tags" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 } catch { Write-Host "Not up yet: $_" })
PowerShell(ssh pi@pi "curl -s --connect-timeout 5 http://192.168.0.174:11434/api/tags | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([m[\\"name\\"] for m in d[\\"models\\"]]\)'")
